subject: Re: S76C++ interior
body:
yes ,, but with piping... in contrat color... ask the
limitless boat captain to send you a photo of the
interior of the tender

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> Is this close to seat design for S76C++  interior
> seats?
> Photo take of Phantom rear seat.
> Exterior color remains as previous S76B (silver). 
> Interior: Tan leather. (Rolls Royce color samples 
> to follow). 
> Please advise if this is the correct color and 
> design so I may have Sikorksy
> start preparing renderings for your  approval.
> Larry V.
> 
> 
> 
>

body_html:
yes ,, but with piping... in contrat color... ask the
limitless boat captain to send you a photo of the
interior of the tender

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,
Is this close to seat design for S76C++ interior
seats?
Photo take of Phantom rear seat.
Exterior color remains as previous S76B (silver).
Interior: Tan leather. (Rolls Royce color samples
to follow).
Please advise if this is the correct color and
design so I may have Sikorksy
start preparing renderings for your approval.
Larry V.
